channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: SwitchIDE - Sat Mar 07 10:51:12 UTC 2026
item.description:
SwitchIDE is a JetBrains IDE plugin that enables seamless switching between different IDEs and IntelliJ IDEA while maintaining precise cursor position.
vendor: Home Battles downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.homebattles.SwitchIDE
